title: Create personal ace-workflows README
summary: Create a personal-sounding README for ace-workflows that introduces Ace's workflow repo, explains that it will publish as much build/process material as possible, and frames the work as an ongoing agent harness engineering learning lab.
acceptance_criteria: the README target path and audience are confirmed before implementation
the README uses a personal voice rather than a generic package README voice
the README explains that the repo shows how Ace builds workflows and workflow systems
the README communicates the intent to publish as much build material as practical
the README names agent harness engineering as the current learning obsession and operating theme
the README artifact is written only after an implement-phase approval exists for its path
workflow state validation passes after tracker updates and after the README is eventually created

context_snapshot.summary: Load workflow-foundry state, every non-done task, Matt/ECC process references, and the existing foundry explainer before shaping the personal README.

session_log.event: Created intake task after user invoked initiate-task for a personal ace-workflows README about publishing build work and learning agent harness engineering.
